name: Royal City Centre
snippet: Free underground parkade and rooftop parking. Over 1,500 stalls.

name: Shops at New West
snippet: Covered parkade adjacent to New Westminster SkyTrain station.

name: Safeway New Westminster Station
snippet: Safeway inside Shops at New West, next to New Westminster SkyTrain. Shares the Shops at New West parkade.

name: Save-On-Foods Columbia Square
snippet: Save-On-Foods at Columbia Square Plaza. Surface lot parking available.

name: Walmart Supercentre New Westminster
snippet: Large free surface parking lot at Walmart Supercentre. No overnight parking.

name: Metropolis at Metrotown
snippet: BC's largest mall. Free parking up to 4 hours in most areas; some paid zones on weekdays.

name: Crystal Mall
snippet: Free underground parking open 6am–11:30pm. Mainly Asian supermarkets and food court.

name: The Amazing Brentwood
snippet: 3 hours free parking on outdoor surface lots. Underground parkade is paid.

name: Highgate Village
snippet: Free underground and street parking. Save-On-Foods customers get 90 min free with vehicle registration.

name: No Frills Burnaby Heights
snippet: Discount grocery store in Burnaby Heights with free underground parkade parking.

name: Whole Foods Market North Burnaby
snippet: Organic grocery store near Brentwood area with free parking for shoppers.

name: Costco Burnaby
snippet: Warehouse store with large free surface parking lot. Membership required to shop.
